top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.name = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.name = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND (c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%' OR c.availability NOT LIKE '%United States%');

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.name = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND (c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%' OR c.availability NOT LIKE '%United States%');

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.asciiName
FROM cards c
WHERE c.asciiName = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.name = 'Adarkar Valkyrie'
  AND c.availability LIKE '%International%'
  AND c.availability NOT LIKE '%US%';
